history.content:
Restart complete — Prometheus is back up after the manual “Telegram quick restart,” and I’m ready to continue.  
High-level change was an internal restart cycle only (no file changes, no proposal/repair artifacts), intended to restore runtime flow from Telegram.  
I can verify next that the gateway is fully booted and Telegram polling is actively resumed — want me to check just live polling status, or end-to-end message receive/send too?
